Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:9000/store/products?limit=2" 2>/dev/null | python -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for p in d.get\('products',[]\)[:2]:
  v = \(p.get\('variants'\) or [{}]\)[0]
  print\('Product:', p.get\('title'\)\)
  print\('  inventory_quantity:', v.get\('inventory_quantity'\)\)
  print\('  prices:', v.get\('prices'\)\)
  print\('  metadata.rabattpreis_cents:', \(p.get\('metadata'\) or {}\).get\('rabattpreis_cents'\)\)
  print\(\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:9000/store/products?limit=5" 2>/dev/null | python -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for p in d.get\('products',[]\):
  v = \(p.get\('variants'\) or [{}]\)[0]
  print\('Product:', p.get\('title','?'\)\)
  print\('  inventory_quantity:', v.get\('inventory_quantity'\)\)
  print\('  manage_inventory:', v.get\('manage_inventory'\)\)
  print\('  allow_backorder:', v.get\('allow_backorder'\)\)
  print\('  rabattpreis_cents:', \(p.get\('metadata'\) or {}\).get\('rabattpreis_cents'\)\)
  print\(\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const c=fs.readFileSync\('apps/sellercentral/src/components/pages/InventoryPage.jsx','utf8'\);const matches=[...c].map\(\(ch,i\)=>{const code=ch.charCodeAt\(0\);if\(code===0x201C||code===0x201D||code===0x2018||code===0x2019\){const line=c.substring\(0,i\).split\('\\n'\).length;return 'L'+line+': '+JSON.stringify\(ch\)+' \(U+'+code.toString\(16\).toUpperCase\(\)+'\)';}return null;}\).filter\(Boolean\);console.log\(matches.join\('\\n'\)||'No smart quotes found'\);")
